creator: anarcat+register@orangeseeds.org
text:
Hi!

I have completely forgotten I am the maintainer of this port, up to the where I have missed the last few update windows.

There's a bitrot-fixing update (0.42) pending now, and I don't really have a platform (or a use case) to test this anymore as I don't have a running FreeBSD system at home.

I hope someone else can pick it up. I'm one of the co-maintainer of the Debian (and upstream) side of things now so I'd still be happy to help if there are any questions.

Note that the anarcat@koumbit.org email address is now dormant as well.

Have a nice day.

A.
